title: IELTS Writing Practice Test 3
description: Writing task on climate change and environment

writingTasks.prompt: The line graph below shows energy consumption in four different countries from 1990 to 2010. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
Some people believe that environmental protection is the responsibility of the government, while others think it is the responsibility of individuals. Discuss both views and give your own opinion.
